notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly ordinary visible events (flying, breaking pillars, escaping) and ambiguous relations. No clearly private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The references to '幽魂曾在激战中屡屡想要对青仇下手' (ch_2064_p0085) and '布置幻沙转影战场困住幽魂、气绝' (ch_2064_p0084) are past events described narratively, not hidden facts. No actor is directly shown in the source as knowing something others do not. No future-known fact is supported. No directly supported knowledge gap exists. All events are either public actions or ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows actions (flying together, breaking pillars, escaping) but no clear observed motive statements. Characters' behaviors are visible but internal motives are ambiguous. 陆畏因 guides 方源 to the floating land and helps escape, but the seed does not directly state why he does so (e.g., alliance purpose, personal goal, or obligation). Only behavior is visible; motive is ambiguous. Cannot infer strategic intent without direct support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily focuses on individual actors (方源, 陆畏因, 气绝魔仙, 吴帅) and their personal conflicts/alliances. No named collective faction, clan, family, or organization appears as a stakeholder with concrete group-level pressure. '三方蛊仙' (three parties of Gu Immortals) is mentioned as pursuers but is too vague to be a named collective actor. '乐土传人' (Le Tu's successor) is an individual title, not a faction. No family, clan, hall, shop, or organization is named in the seed facts or relations that could serve as a faction pressure subject.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
